items.question: Can I try it for free?
items.answer: Yes, we offer a free tier with 10 analyses per month, no credit card required.

items.question: Which chat tools are supported?
items.answer: We currently support exports from WeChat, WhatsApp, Telegram, iMessage and more.

items.question: How is data security ensured?
items.answer: We use end-to-end encryption and delete original data immediately after analysis to ensure your privacy.
